name: tech-advisory-board
description: Multi-agent advisory board for technical decisions — stack selection, architecture choices, framework/database comparisons, project planning. Champions debate, Advisors evaluate, Scout maps landscape. Backed by current web research via MCPs (perplexity, context7, brave-search).

max_cost_per_session_usd.title: Max cost per session (USD)
max_cost_per_session_usd.description: Abort a TAB session if the estimated cost exceeds this threshold (USD). Overrides TAB/config.json budget.max_cost_per_session_usd.

warn_at_usd.title: Cost warning threshold (USD)
warn_at_usd.description: Emit a soft cost warning when session spend crosses this threshold (USD).

language_preference.title: Preferred output language
language_preference.description: Preferred output language as a BCP 47 tag (e.g. en, pt-BR). Used when the user's first message is ambiguous. Applies globally across all projects.

default_mode.title: Default session mode
default_mode.description: Mode used when the Moderator's complexity classification is ambiguous. One of Express, Quick, Standard, Complete, Complete+. Leave unset to let the Moderator classify automatically.

auditor_enabled.title: Enable mandatory Auditor
auditor_enabled.description: When true (default), the Auditor subagent runs in Complete / Complete+ / Rechallenge modes. Set false to skip — requires an auditor_override_reason in TAB/config.json.

supervisor_gate_enabled.title: Enable Supervisor consensus-theater gate
supervisor_gate_enabled.description: When true (default), the Moderator invokes the Supervisor subagent if any of the four §12.1 consensus-theater triggers fire after the advisor phase. Set false to disable the gate.

adr_dir_override.title: ADR output directory override
adr_dir_override.description: Override the default TAB/decisions/ directory for generated ADRs. Absolute path or relative to the project root. Leave unset to use the default.
